title: no licensing on one of exceljs dependencies
author: antoniobeltran
body: Not sure if this is the place to ask, but I'm using exceljs, and this uses [buffers](https://www.npmjs.com/package/buffers) which is used by binary of which node-unzipper references. Security alarms went off stating that there is no license and the github accounts have been deleted. I'm wondering what your thoughts are on this.

comments.author: pnappa
comments.body: I had a go at resolving this - I'm avoiding this package exactly for the same reason you mentioned here. It's too legally risky to use this library as it stands (even for open-source purposes).

comments.author: k0s15
comments.body:
Hi pnappa,

Any timeline for releasing this pull request?

Hi contributors,

Any contributors can help to review on the pull request?

comments.author: pnappa
comments.body: Hi @k0s15 , I'm not a maintainer of this repository. You can see my suggested pull request above (#2687). You'll have to wait for a maintainer to merge it.
